title: DataPackAutoDownload
description: A mod that allows datapacks to specify dependencies, such as mods, resource packs, or other datapacks.
body:
### DataPack Auto Download

DPAD is a mod that will let datapack developers automatically specify dependencies that they are using in their `pack.mcmeta` file, these dependencies are then downloaded when the world loads.

Datapack dependencies will install and function directly.
Mod dependencies will require a restart.
Resource pack dependencies are sent to all clients on join, similar to server resource packs.

[Example pack.mcmeta](https://gist.github.com/ThatRobin/fcfdb9f9ba2e429dbb9587bf3d5ecece)
